stories.title: Asian tech rout triggers Kospi circuit breaker
stories.summary: South Korea's Kospi plunged around 10% and tripped a circuit breaker as SK Hynix and Samsung both fell more than 10% in a chip-led selloff.

stories.title: Starmer to step down as Labour leader
stories.summary: Keir Starmer said he will quit as Labour leader while staying on as prime minister until a successor is chosen, with nominations opening July 9.

stories.title: US issues 60-day sanctions waiver as Iran talks progress
stories.summary: Washington granted a 60-day waiver letting Iran sell oil internationally as Vice President Vance said US-Iran talks set a 'good foundation' to end the war.

stories.title: China sanctions 10 US military-linked firms
stories.summary: Beijing announced sanctions on 10 American military-related companies after a US move barring some Chinese tech firms from defense contracts.

stories.title: Czech president excluded from NATO summit delegation
stories.summary: PM Andrej Babis said President Petr Pavel will not join the Czech delegation to next month's NATO summit in Ankara, escalating a domestic dispute.

stories.title: Global stocks slide as investors flee tech
stories.summary: The MSCI All Country World Index slipped about 0.6% as investors rotated out of this year's high-flying technology shares.

stories.title: FTSE 100 climbs to a record close
stories.summary: UK blue chips closed higher, with the FTSE 100 up 0.72% to 10,437.85, aided by lower oil prices and optimism over US-Iran talks.

stories.title: Oil holds losses on Iran de-escalation hopes
stories.summary: Crude prices stayed lower after the US sanctions waiver raised the prospect of more Iranian oil returning to global markets.

stories.title: Google's Gemini 3.5 Pro nears general availability
stories.summary: Gemini 3.5 Pro, with a 2-million-token context window and a Deep Think mode, sits in its GA window but remains in limited Vertex AI preview.

stories.title: Megacap tech and chipmakers lead the selloff
stories.summary: Alphabet fell about 5% and Amazon dropped nearly 5% as the rotation out of AI and chip names rippled from Asia into US tech.

stories.title: Bitcoin slides below $63K
stories.summary: Bitcoin traded around $62,250, down roughly $2,785 from a day earlier as it broke through key support levels.

stories.title: Leverage flush wipes out $1.23B in positions
stories.summary: A cascade of liquidations totaling about $1.23 billion hit the market as leveraged long positions were forced out.

stories.title: Fear & Greed Index sinks to 'Extreme Fear'
stories.summary: The Crypto Fear & Greed Index fell to 23 as steady spot-ETF outflows pulled a layer of consistent buying out of the market.

stories.title: T. rex may have taken 40 years to reach full size
stories.summary: A study of 17 tyrannosaur fossils suggests the predator grew far more slowly than thought, taking about 40 years to reach roughly eight tons.

stories.title: A 'good guy' DNA gene can turn harmful
stories.summary: Researchers found the EXO1 gene, normally DNA-protective, can become dangerous when cells produce too much of it.

stories.title: World's rarest marine mammal preserved in 3D
stories.summary: Scientists created highly detailed 3D models of a vaquita skeleton, digitally preserving the critically endangered porpoise.

stories.title: GLP-1 drugs linked to lower breast cancer risk
stories.summary: Women taking GLP-1 medications were about 30% less likely to develop breast cancer, a new analysis found.

stories.title: Oral GLP-1 shows strong results in diabetes trial
stories.summary: A new oral GLP-1 medication sharply improved blood-sugar control and drove weight loss in a major type 2 diabetes trial.

stories.title: NHS rolls out five-session prostate radiotherapy
stories.summary: NHS England will offer SABR to eligible early-stage prostate cancer patients, cutting treatment from 20+ sessions to five.

stories.title: FDA broadens over-the-counter naloxone access
stories.summary: The FDA expanded over-the-counter availability of the overdose-reversal drug naloxone amid wider healthcare policy moves.

stories.title: Messi becomes World Cup's all-time top scorer
stories.summary: Lionel Messi netted a brace against Austria to become the World Cup's all-time leading goalscorer.

stories.title: England face Ghana in Group L
stories.summary: Harry Kane and England meet Ghana in Foxborough on a loaded Monday World Cup slate also featuring Mbappe and Haaland.

stories.title: Bucks trade Giannis to the Heat
stories.summary: Milwaukee ended its Giannis Antetokounmpo era, sending the All-Star forward to Miami a day before the NBA Draft.

stories.title: Knicks lead Spurs 2-0 in NBA Finals
stories.summary: The New York Knicks surged to a 2-0 series lead over the San Antonio Spurs in the NBA Finals.

stories.title: 2026 domestic box office nears $4 billion
stories.summary: The year-to-date US box office is approaching $4 billion, running about 13% ahead of the same frame a year ago.

stories.title: 'Scary Movie' opens to a franchise record
stories.summary: Paramount-Miramax's new 'Scary Movie' is set to win the weekend with a franchise-best opening above $52 million.

stories.title: Super Mario films cross $2 billion
stories.summary: 'The Super Mario Galaxy Movie' pushed the franchise past $2 billion, the first video-game film series to do so.
